title: Sandwich Mod
body:
# Sandwich Mod

Unleash your culinary creativity in Minecraft with the Sandwich Mod! This mod lets you craft a variety of delicious sandwiches using ingredients like bread, meats, and unique crops such as peanuts and grapes. Make classic sandwiches or invent new recipes to boost your in-game hunger and health. Whether you're playing solo or on a server, this mod enhances your food experience with fun and flavorful options.

![recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/7116e5e8f2c914f32c14ae8965dc8c0d8727a55a.png)

## Features:

- Diverse Ingredients: Use a wide range of ingredients including various meats, bread types, and new crops like peanuts and grapes.
  
- Custom Recipes: Create your own unique sandwich recipes to suit your playstyle and taste.
  
- Nutritional Benefits: Enjoy enhanced hunger and health benefits from eating different sandwiches.
  
- Server Compatibility: Fully compatible with multiplayer servers, bringing a new level of fun to communal play.
  
- Simple Integration: Seamlessly integrates with the vanilla Minecraft experience, making it easy to use and enjoy.

## Added Recipes:

- Bread Slice: Crafted from bread.
  
![recipe for bread slice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/0a3a915f655fa8006d79f04d9f116d18fbda98e0.png)
  
- Meat Sandwiches: Made with two bread slices and one piece of cooked meat.

![Meat Sandwiches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/ac938f3c2f30941bc3099bda77ff4ffde8efb8aa.gif)
 
- PBJ Sandwich: Crafted using grape jelly and peanut butter between two bread slices.

![PBJ Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/29c41dafd60ad8868f097d285edf33e9aa5a9c9a.png)
  
- Egg Sandwich: Requires a cooked egg and two slices of bread.

![Egg Sandwich](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/9c419df1a614f987f9ec843b0638f2bcceda805a.png)
  
- Peanut Butter: Made from three peanuts.

![Peanut Butter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/4787d92152964c822279a0ea4ce0c66bb518c308.png)
  
- Grape Jelly: Created using grapes and sugar.

![Grape Jelly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/41531309668879102504aadf2cced72c611eecae.png)
  
- Grape Seeds: Dropped when breaking vines; used to grow grapes.

![Grape Seeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/cefc0d03332b9313a0aea25d28bdcff4ae944958.png)

- Peanut Seeds: Dropped when digging in dirt with grass on top; used to grow peanuts.

![Peanut Seeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sm2DaGt2/images/5e97ce42c02596d956f7f1a65dceb01cb64dad8c.png)
  
Grape and peanut seeds have low drop rates but can be grown once found, ensuring a sustainable source of ingredients for your sandwiches.
  
With the Sandwich Mod, elevate your Minecraft culinary adventures and discover the joy of sandwich making! Download now and start building the ultimate sandwiches.

## Compatibility:

The Sandwich mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/sandwichmod/versions?g=1.21)
- [1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/sandwichmod/versions?g=1.20.4)
- [1.20.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/sandwichmod/versions?g=1.20.2)
- [1.16.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/sandwichmod/versions?g=1.16.4)
